headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 22, 2026**
article:
The Houston Astros suffered a tough loss to the Cleveland Guardians, who took the game 5-8. Angel Martínez led the Guardians' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 1 RBI. Meanwhile, the Cincinnati Reds dominated the Tampa Bay Rays, securing a 12-6 victory. Elly De La Cruz led the Reds' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries, including San Francisco Giants catcher Daniel Susac, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow ulnar neuritis. The Houston Astros have also lost Taylor Trammell to a left groin strain, while the Boston Red Sox have placed Sonny Gray on the 15-day injured list with a right hamstring strain.

The Houston Astros have made a move to bolster their roster, trading RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake. Additionally, the Los Angeles Dodgers traded RHP Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for RHP Chayce McDermott, and the New York Mets traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Guardians in 5-8 Thriller**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros suffered a tough loss to the Cleveland Guardians, who took the game 5-8. Angel Martínez led the Guardians' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Reds Rout Rays 12-6**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds dominated the Tampa Bay Rays, securing a 12-6 victory. Elly De La Cruz led the Reds' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Marlins 5-3**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 5-3 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Dustin May earning the win after 5.1 innings of work. Nathan Church led the Cardinals' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Brewers Blast Past Tigers 12-4**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers dominated the Detroit Tigers in a lopsided victory, securing a 12-4 win. Brice Turang led the Brewers' offense with 2 hits, 4 RBIs, and 5 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Giants C Daniel Susac Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: San Francisco Giants catcher Daniel Susac has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow ulnar neuritis, effective retroactive to April 20, 2026.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros have made a move to bolster their roster, trading RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake.
